titleStmt.title: SII 5.1249: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1249. (A.R. No. 367 of 1896). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

summary.p: Partly published in Ep. Ind., Vol. VI, p. 267 f.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1215 gunēṁḍu vīraśrīna
ranārasiṁhyadēvaru vijayarājyasaṁ vvatsaraṁbu(la)
lu 18 gu śrāhi riṣabha śukla pau¨rṇnamiyu guruvā
ramuna śrīkū¨rmmanādhuniki śrīnarahari tī¨rtthaśrīpā
damulu riṣabha śukla pau¨rnnami jyēṣṭanakṣatramaṁddu .
pratisaṁvvatsaramaṁddunnu mūlaOriginallycairavamuna was cut and subsequently cai and va were scored out.bēramunaku U
tsavaperumāḷlakuṁgā dēvasthāna Abhiṣēkapaṁccāmri
tadravyālaku (.) UppannaUpakaraṇadravyālakuṁgā śrībha
ṁḍāramunaṁ cellē gaṁḍamā 5 � Ī mā 1 � nēla pō
li paṟa 1 lekkanu Ēṁḍādiki naina paṟka 60 laki Upeṭi
dyavastha . Abhiṣēkamuna paṁccāmitramunaku pa 5
caṁddanamu palamulu 4� pa 10 . ka¨rppura� 7 pa
2 . puṣpalaku pa 1 . tirumaḍapaṁḍlu 20� pa
10 pāyasamu paḍla 2� pa 2 . Appalu peḍlu 2
� pa 4 . kuḍmulupaḍlu 4� pa 4 . gā¨ryyalu
paḍlu 4� pa 4 . Aṭkulu cuppōluṁgā pa 2 .
pānamu paḍlu 4� pa 2 . kaṟiAmudunaku
pa 1 . Īlōni miriyālaku pa 2 . tirumaḍa
paṁḍla mīṁddhi pappuna pesalaku pa 1 . paiḍlu 4
0� pa 4 . padēsi Ākula viḍyālu 100� pa 6 . ṁgā
pa 60 diki pritisaṁvatsaramaṁddunu lagnakālamaṁddhu
Abhiṣēkamu Avadhariṁcci . Uppannamu Aragiṁpaṁgolāru
Ī dha¨rmmuvu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastāĪ cellunaṭagā tirupati śrī
vaiṣṇavarakṣa . svadattāṁ paradattaṁ vvā yō harē
tu vasuṁddhara . ṣaṣṭiṁ varuṣasahasrāṇī vi
ṣṭayāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 5.1249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
